# Aura Intercept

> AI operatives that automate customer engagement, field operations, billing, marketing, and analytics for service businesses.

Aura Intercept deploys 24 specialized AI operatives across 7 consoles (Customer Portal, Field Ops, Business Management, Marketing & Sales, Social Media, Analytics, Specialists) on a 4-tier subscription (Core, Boost, Pro, Elite) with a 90-day live trial.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, agent catalog, and pricing.
- [For Your Industry](/for-business): Industry-specific demos and value props (HVAC, plumbing, salons, restaurants, and more).
- [Free AI Opportunity Audit](/audit): Personalized AI readiness audit for service businesses.
- [About](/about): Mission, values, and team behind Aura Intercept.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI automation for service businesses.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Aura Intercept team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
